cases.prompt: 把设置页的按钮间距调一下并修复 hover 色值不一致问题
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
hard_fail_if: report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 用户创建订单时报 500，帮我定位并修复，顺便补测试
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
hard_fail_if: report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 新增一个订单导出功能，前端加入口，后端提供下载 API
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
plan file path in Context Loaded
hard_fail_if: missing plan file path in Context Loaded
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 线上支付回调挂了，先快速修复恢复服务
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
hard_fail_if: report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 整理一下 agents 规则，减少重复并提高可维护性
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
hard_fail_if: only editing one role while breaking others
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 用户偶尔遇到 502，本地复现不了，帮我查清楚再改，不要着急打补丁
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
RCA or falsifiable hypothesis with evidence before substantive fix
test or monitoring evidence in English
hard_fail_if: no documented root cause or falsifiable hypothesis before fix
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 改了下结账页布局和优惠券入口，部署在 preview 上了，验证下别回归
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
QA validation with user-visible evidence in English
hard_fail_if: QA sign-off with no observable UI evidence
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 要在生产 Postgres 上跑迁移并切换读写，今晚维护窗口做
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
validation or smoke evidence in English
hard_fail_if: destructive or prod change without high-risk checklist
report is non-English without user override

cases.prompt: 帮我全面测一下登录流程，只出 bug 报告和复现步骤，不要改业务代码
must_have_artifacts: assignment language contract (EN keys + CN task body)
structured findings with repro steps in English
hard_fail_if: unauthorized changes to application business logic
runs full QC trio when Assignment states report-only with no implementation diffs
report is non-English without user override
